title: Government doing its best: Karnataka High Court refuses to intervene in LPG short supply crisis
description: The Karnataka High Court on Monday refused to entertain a petition seeking the uninterrupted supply of Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) cylinders to hotels and restaurants in the State amid a global short supply crisis. Justice Sachin Shankar Magadum agreed with Solicitor General Tushar Mehta's submission that the matter is best left for the government to address."Government is doing their best.
